name: Zumbaton WhatsApp Bot v2 — Memory + Human Handover

assignments.name: reply
assignments.value: Our team is handling your chat — they'll be with you very shortly 👋

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ orgId: $('Normalize Input').item.json.defaultLeadOrgId || 'org_zumbaton', phone: $('Normalize Input').item.json.from, userMessage: $('Normalize Input').item.json.body || '', botReply: '', secret: $('Normalize Input').item.json.botSecret }) }}

assignments.name: reply
assignments.value: Got your voice note! 🎙️ Voice transcription is coming soon — for now, please send your question as text and I'll help you right away.

assignments.name: reply
assignments.value: Thanks for the image! 📸 I can't read images just yet — please drop your question as text and I'll get right back to you!

assignments.name: reply
assignments.value: Received your attachment! Please send your question as text for now and I'll help straight away 😊

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ orgId: $('Normalize Input').item.json.defaultLeadOrgId || 'org_zumbaton', phone: $json.from || $('Normalize Input').item.json.from, userMessage: $json.userMsg, botReply: $json.reply, secret: $('Normalize Input').item.json.botSecret }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ orgId: $('Normalize Input').item.json.defaultLeadOrgId || 'org_zumbaton', name: $('Process Reply').item.json.leadName, email: $('Process Reply').item.json.leadEmail, phone: $('Process Reply').item.json.leadPhone || $('Process Reply').item.json.whatsappNumber, notes: 'WhatsApp: ' + ($('Process Reply').item.json.whatsappNumber || ''), secret: $('Normalize Input').item.json.botSecret }) }}

parameters.subject: =🎉 New Lead: {{ $('Process Reply').item.json.leadName }}

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ orgId: $('Normalize Input').item.json.defaultLeadOrgId || 'org_zumbaton', phone: $('Process Reply').item.json.from || $('Normalize Input').item.json.from, status: 'human_takeover', secret: $('Normalize Input').item.json.botSecret }) }}

parameters.message:
=🚨 Customer asked to speak with someone

{{ $('Process Reply').item.json.whatsappNumber }}

Last message: "{{ $('Process Reply').item.json.userMsg }}"

The bot is still chatting with them. Use your dashboard to start human takeover when you're ready.

={{ $('Process Reply').item.json.reply + "\n\n" + "I've let our team know someone asked to speak with them — they can follow up when they're free. I'm still here if you want class times, pricing, or anything else in the meantime 😊" }}

parameters.content:
ZUMBATON WHATSAPP BOT v2 — Memory + Human Handover + Notifications

━━ CONFIG (node: Normalize Input) — no n8n Variables needed (Community Edition OK) ━━
  convexSiteBase → full URL, e.g. https://fantastic-wolverine-819.eu-west-1.convex.site (no trailing slash)
  botSecret → same value as Convex WHATSAPP_BOT_HTTP_SECRET (leave empty only if Convex also has no secret — dev only)
  defaultLeadOrgId → org_zumbaton (or your org id for /dashboard filters)
  ownerPhoneNumber → owner's WhatsApp E.164 WITHOUT whatsapp: prefix

━━ TWILIO WHATSAPP FORMAT RULE ━━
  In Twilio send nodes, keep "To Whatsapp" enabled and use plain +E.164 for From/To (no whatsapp: prefix).

━━ CREDENTIALS (IMPORTANT) ━━
  Twilio trigger and all Twilio send nodes must use the SAME Twilio account that owns the WhatsApp sender.
  If the sender is on another account/subaccount, sends fail even when number format is correct.

━━ HUMAN TAKEOVER ━━
  Real human_takeover in Convex is started from the /dashboard only.
  If a customer asks for a human, n8n pings the owner (Notify Owner) but does NOT set takeover — the bot keeps replying until you take over from the dashboard.
  Node "Set Handover Status in Convex" is disabled; enable only if you want auto-takeover again.

━━ OTHER PLACEHOLDERS ━━
  FROM_EMAIL / STUDIO_EMAIL → SMTP Send Lead Email node

━━ CREDENTIALS ━━
  twilioApi · OpenRouter · SMTP

━━ CONVEX ━━
  Deploy: pnpm exec convex deploy
  convex env set WHATSAPP_BOT_HTTP_SECRET (must match botSecret above in production)

━━ FLOW ━━
  Twilio → Normalize (config here) → Convex HTTP → LLM → save messages / ingest lead / email / WA
  Vercel /dashboard/leads uses api.leads.list
